meaning: n.排除,除外,被排除在外的事物
examples: Exclusion of air creates a vacuum in the bottle.
Exclusion of generics industry from taking responsibility is questionable.
McClaren has reassured Bentley his exclusion from the squad is only for one game.
When you sell, that part of the house is ineligible for the homeowner exclusion.
There will be an exclusion zone during the Olympic Games covering almost all of Weymouth Bay.
